passiveAbilities.name: Harpoon
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Impact or Slicing Melee Dmg, reduce the Dmg dealt by -1. If this character deals Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

activeAbilities.name: Bawdy Jokes
activeAbilities.description: All Goblins within the pulse are moved 1” directly towards this model. Then, all other Goblins within 1” gain +1 energy.

arcaneAbilities.name: Rough Tides
arcaneAbilities.description:
Move other target model X” directly away.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 1 Wd and loses all energy.

arcaneAbilities.name: Seasick
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target loses X energy.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds and loses all energy.

signatureMove.name: It’s a big’un!
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy suffered 1 or more Wds during this round of Melee, it cannot take a Jog action until end of turn.
